series_metadata.series_description: Records include geologic exploration reports and supporting documents associated with a Final Permit to Install, to include boring logs, laboratory tests and any attached exhibits characterizing subsurface conditions at a site.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Keep at least related facility is closed or records are no longer of value Division as a technical reference determining suitability of site comply with future Permit Install requirements. Review annually ; Electronic: Keep at least related facility is closed or records are no longer of value Division as a technical reference determining suitability of site comply with future Permit Install requirements. Review annually
